positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a mystical bioluminescent forest. The scene centers on an intricately designed silhouette of a watchful forest guardian creature (like a blend of deer and fox), surrounded by glowing flora and crystalline roots. Use a gothic-fantasy aesthetic with strong chiaroscuro lighting. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, vibrant electric cyan, emerald green, and hints of violet, creating extreme contrast against solid black negative space. The art style must mimic a detailed tattoo flash drawing or screen-print graphic, with clean linework and high saturation, suitable for repeating pattern or single central apparel placement. Central composition, symmetrical framing.
negative: blurry, grain, noisy, text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, low contrast, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, solid color backgrounds
